items.briefing:
With school holidays underway, businesses face a heightened risk of cyber fraud, as reduced staffing and relaxed routines make it easier for scammers to slip through. Staff should also be alert to a job scam circulating that impersonates well-known brands to steal Google account credentials — particularly targeting marketing professionals, but anyone could be approached.

Separately, Telstra experienced a mobile outage affecting services across Australia today. If you notice unusual communication issues, verify through official channels before assuming a message or call is legitimate — outages are often exploited by scammers posing as carriers.

**Practical tip:** Be extra cautious about unexpected job offers or login requests via email or social media — verify directly with the supposed sender before clicking any links.

featured.title: Telstra mobile outage disrupts services across Australia
featured.quote: Major national telco outage disrupts services across Australia, exposing critical infrastructure vulnerability.
